page_title: Shin Evangelion Theatrical Edition - Complete Record Collection - Visual Story Edition
text:
is an artbook for the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.11 Thrice Upon A Time created by khara inc.. It was published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 08 March 2025 for the original price of 4,400 yen + tax. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/490503325X 

Overview

An artbook with the visual story of the Evangelion: 3.0+1.11 Thrice Upon A Time film. The cover is illustrated by Atsushi Nishigori.

Contents

Visual Story: Full screenshots of all the film in sequence
Music cue sheet

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 490503325X
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4905033257
